response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has strong full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which aligns well with the role's GenAI and cloud focus. However, while he has AI-adjacent experience, his resume lacks explicit evidence of building production-grade AI solutions, designing RAG architectures, or working with vector databases. His background is more general software engineering with some AI tooling exposure.
strengths: Demonstrated expertise in TypeScript and Node.js, which are core technologies for the role.
Recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators at re:cinq.
Strong full-stack engineering background with staff-level experience and leadership in technical domains.
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent system frameworks in prior roles.
Limited evidence of building production-grade AI solutions or handling structured/unstructured data pipelines.
Background leans more toward general software engineering than specialized AI/ML engineering.
